rationale: Educ. Code §26.010 governs parental removal of children from school instruction conflicting with religious or moral beliefs. It is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 26.010. EXEMPTION FROM INSTRUCTION. (a) A parent is entitled to remove the parent's child temporarily from a class or other school activity that conflicts with the parent's religious or moral beliefs
_note: No conflict. The rule_text concerns education policy (parental exemption from instruction), not tax policy. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no bearing on this statute.
